goal: Clear current repo-local regressions, align runtime and rubric contract interpretation, and add lab-owned artifacts that make self-scoring more earned than structural.
constraints: Do not modify external domain chip repos on Desktop
behavioral_changes: PreToolUse advisory now preserves session domain context while still narrowing to session chips
belief_promotion recognizes a broader set of valid belief artifact locations
v2 manifest validity accepts closed enum mutation spaces as structural validation
v2 guardrails_set accepts bounded loop guardrails that do not rely solely on blocked command fragments
chip_runtime now prefers file-based hook execution for CLI-style commands and honors chip_name in manifests
deep_eval now recognizes current manifest conventions and can load run history from research/meta
the lab now stores rubric-visible doctrine, contradiction, evidence, packet, and run-history artifacts in allowed paths
doctrine text now explains mechanisms more explicitly, increasing causal density without weakening evaluator standards
the packet library now contains 30 structured packets, improving evidence reuse and packet-score depth
all four evidence lanes now contain denser product-facing analysis, raising evidence integrity to the full rubric score
the lab now records real executed evaluation passes in research/meta, bringing the ledger to 50 runs without synthetic backfill
follow_up: Keep appending real future run history instead of treating runs.jsonl as a one-time bootstrap artifact
Generate additional packets from repeated multi-chip transfer wins
Rewrite repo status docs to separate shipped versus aspirational claims
If mutable_targets are expanded in a future pass, deepen obsidian-vault content to address the remaining watchtower gap directly
Continue increasing empirical run volume through real future lab passes rather than synthetic history
